message:
Wrap service worker cache operations in try/catch for resilience

The fetch handler's cache-write path and the offline navigation fallback
both call Cache API methods that can throw (e.g. when storage quota is
exceeded or the Cache API is unavailable). Previously these exceptions
would propagate up and prevent a successful network response from being
returned. Now both paths are wrapped in try/catch so cache failures are
logged as warnings without disrupting the primary fetch flow.

Adds a test asserting the new try/catch structure is present.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
